Desmera Redwyne
Desmera Redwyne by Andreia Ugrai © Fantasy Flight Games
Allegiance House Redwyne
Culture Reach
Born 283 AC[1]
Father Paxter Redwyne
Mother Mina Tyrell
Books
  • A Game of Thrones (appendix)
  • A Clash of Kings (appendix)
  • A Storm of Swords (appendix)
  • A Feast for Crows (mentioned)
  • A Dance with Dragons (appendix)

Desmera Redwyne is a noblewoman of House Redwyne and is the daughter and youngest child of Lord Paxter Redwyne and Mina Tyrell.[2]

Contents

  • 1 Appearance
  • 2 History
  • 3 Recent Events
    • 3.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 4 Quotes
  • 5 Family
  • 6 References

Appearance[ ]

Desmera is known for her freckles.[3]

History[ ]

Lord Randyll Tarly hoped for his son and heir, Samwell, to be taken as Lord Paxter Redwyne's page at the Arbor and in due time be betrothed to Desmera. Her brothers Horas and Hobber bullied Sam during his visit, however, and Randyll brought his son back to Horn Hill.[4]

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

Ser Daven Lannister mentions how his father, Ser Stafford, had been negotiating with Lord Paxter Redwyne about a marriage between the nicely-dowered Desmera to Daven. Lord Tywin Lannister, however, promised a marriage between Daven and an unspecified female member of House Frey, after Lord Walder Frey changes sides in the War of the Five Kings and joins House Lannister.[3]

Quotes[ ]

Daven: My own father was treating with Paxter Redwyne before Oxcross, did you know? Redwyne has a nicely dowered daughter ...

Jaime: Desmera? How well do you like freckles?

Daven: If my choice is Freys or freckles, well ... half of Lord Walder's brood look like stoats.[3]

—Daven Lannister and Jaime Lannister
